Media Object
Media Object base API
Data Fields
memory_t Struct Reference

Describes a contiguous block of memory with offset and flags.

#include <memory.h>

size_t offset
 
size_t size

Field Documentation

◆ data

Pointer to the raw memory data.

Total allocated size of data in bytes.

size_t memory_t::offset
